📚 Free Online Curriculum

The Future of Product Marketing

The Practitioner's Guide to the Agentic Era

By Chris O'Hara & Dan Yu

10x Yourself in the Agentic Era

This free curriculum teaches you how to transform your PMM practice using AI agents. Each chapter includes a summary, downloadable deck, PDF handout, and comprehension quiz.

Chapters

Words

Forever
